name: Suggestion chip
goal: Tappable follow-up-prompt chip that emits its value when selected — for rendering quick replies and suggested next prompts under assistant messages.
description: Interactive pill-shaped chip designed for chat surfaces. Emits a ce-suggestion-select event carrying the prompt value when clicked or activated via keyboard. Distinct from ce-chip (non-interactive status display): suggestion-chip is an intent primitive — it initiates user action. Supports disabled and selected states, an optional leading icon attribute, and a named icon slot for richer overrides.

props.name: value
props.description: Payload emitted in the ce-suggestion-select event detail. Falls back to trimmed textContent when empty.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Makes the chip non-interactive and visually greyed out.

props.name: selected
props.description: Visually highlights the chip to indicate the prompt has already been chosen.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional leading emoji or short text rendered before the default slot. Overridden by slotted content in the icon slot.

events.name: ce-suggestion-select
events.description: Fired on click or Enter/Space key when not disabled. detail.value is the value prop when non-empty, otherwise the trimmed textContent.

slots.description: Chip label — the prompt text shown to the user.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Overrides the icon attribute with richer content such as an SVG icon.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition-fast
cssVariables.description: Transition duration for hover/focus state changes.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Hover border color and selected text color.

a11y.notes: Host receives role=button and tabindex=0 on connect. When disabled, aria-disabled=true is set and tabindex is removed. Enter and Space activate the chip.
